name: shogo
author: Shogo Labs

scripts.dev: tsc && npm run bundle:main && npm run bundle:pty-host && electron .
scripts.build: tsc && npm run bundle:main && npm run bundle:pty-host
scripts.test:desktop-bundle: bun test-web-bundle.ts && bun test-sync-web.ts && bun test-forge-config.ts
scripts.//package: sync-web.mjs is invoked by forge's `prePackage` hook (see forge.config.ts) so it fires for both `npm run package` AND `npx electron-forge package` — the npm `prepackage` lifecycle hook only covered the former and let v1.8.12/v1.8.13 ship without Monaco.

//comment: Note: apps/desktop is installed via `npm install` (not the bun workspace) — see local package-lock.json. Workspace TS deps like @shogo-ai/worker are NOT a node_modules entry here; they're resolved via tsconfig `paths` for type-checking and inlined into dist/main.js by `scripts/bundle-main.mjs` (which runs `bun build` from the repo root where workspace symlinks DO exist).
